---
title: "About"
---

## About me

Hi, I'm **Melanie Jensen**, a student at Southern Utah University. I'm studying <!-- TODO: update with your major and year, e.g. "statistics, currently in my junior year" --> _[add your major and year here]_. This site started as a place to collect my Math 3190 assignments &mdash; it's also turning into a little portfolio of the data science tools I've been learning along the way.

## About the course

**Math 3190: Fundamentals of Data Science** is an undergraduate course at Southern Utah University, taught by Professor **Rick Brown**. The course covers the full data-science workflow, including:

- Data wrangling and exploratory analysis with the `tidyverse`
- Querying relational databases with SQL
- Statistical inference and resampling methods (bootstrapping)
- Linear regression, regularization (ridge, lasso), and model selection
- Dimension reduction and principal components
- Classification methods (Naive Bayes, SVM)
- Time series analysis and forecasting

Everything is done in a reproducible way using **Quarto** and **Git**, with assignments turned in via GitHub.

## Skills & tools

Through the coursework collected on this site, I've gained hands-on experience with:

- **Languages:** R (primary), a bit of Python (via `reticulate`), SQL
- **Reproducible documents:** Quarto, R Markdown
- **Data wrangling & viz:** `tidyverse` (`dplyr`, `tidyr`, `ggplot2`), `lubridate`, `patchwork`, `GGally`
- **Statistical modeling:** linear and logistic regression, `glmnet` for ridge/lasso, `caret` for cross-validation, `pls` and `umap` for dimension reduction, `faraway`
- **Machine learning & classification:** `caret`, `rsample`, `e1071`, `kernlab`, `naivebayes`
- **Time series:** `forecast`, `tsibble`, `tseries`, `itsmr`
- **Databases:** `DBI`, `RSQLite`, `dbplyr`
- **Version control & collaboration:** Git, GitHub, Unix command line

## Get in touch

The best way to see the code behind everything here is on [GitHub](https://github.com/mjens328/Math_3190_Homework_Assignments). You can also reach me at [meljensen328@gmail.com](mailto:meljensen328@gmail.com).
